name_en: In stock Classic, Exclusive ZP Development
name_cn:
In stock Classic, Exclusive ZP Development
Chane✨New Colorful Pink CF Chain Clutch Bag
Classic Pearlized New Color
Twist closure with sliding chain, switch between shoulder and crossbody. The bag looks very exquisite and versatile. This pink-gold color really catches the eye 🤩 A mix of girly and luxurious, paired with light gold hardware, full of queen vibes ❤️
Size 25.5 15 6cm ,
Number A1112 Colorful Pink
